allow: PowerShell(cd "d:\\ai-mom-system\\electron-app"; $env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE = "1"; npx cross-env ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE= .\\node_modules\\electron\\dist\\electron.exe debug-test.js 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell(cd "d:\\ai-mom-system\\electron-app"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "launcher.js" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { Write-Host "Electron is running \(PID $\($proc.Id\)\)" } else { Write-Host "Exited with code $\($proc.ExitCode\)" })

PowerShell(cd "d:\\ai-mom-system\\electron-app"; $env2 = [System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary[string,string]]::new\(\); foreach \($kv in [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariables\(\).GetEnumerator\(\)\) { if \($kv.Key -ne "ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE"\) { $env2[$kv.Key] = $kv.Value } }; $psi = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo; $psi.FileName = ".\\node_modules\\electron\\dist\\electron.exe"; $psi.Arguments = "test-minimal.js"; $psi.UseShellExecute = $false; $psi.RedirectStandardOutput = $true; $psi.RedirectStandardError = $true; foreach \($kv in $env2.GetEnumerator\(\)\) { $psi.EnvironmentVariables[$kv.Key] = $kv.Value }; $p = [System.Diagnostics.Process]::Start\($psi\); Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; if \(-not $p.HasExited\) { Write-Host "RUNNING"; $p.Kill\(\) } else { Write-Host "EXITED $\($p.ExitCode\)" }; $out = $p.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd\(\); $err = $p.StandardError.ReadToEnd\(\); Write-Host "OUT: $out"; Write-Host "ERR: $err")

PowerShell(cd "d:\\ai-mom-system\\electron-app"; Remove-Item Env:\\ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE now: '$env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE'"; .\\node_modules\\electron\\dist\\electron.exe test-minimal.js; Write-Host "Exit: $LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(cd "d:\\ai-mom-system\\electron-app"; Remove-Item Env:\\ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { cd "d:\\ai-mom-system\\electron-app"; node launcher.js }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $running = Get-Process electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($running\) { Write-Host "Electron IS running \(PID $\($running.Id\)\)"; $running | Stop-Process } else { Write-Host "Electron not found in process list" }; Receive-Job $job; Remove-Job $job -Force)

PowerShell(cd "d:\\ai-mom-system\\electron-app"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "d:\\ai-mom-system\\electron-app"; npm start 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; $running = Get-Process electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($running\) { Write-Host "SUCCESS: Electron running with $\($running.Count\) processes" } else { Write-Host "FAIL: No electron processes found" }; Receive-Job $job | Select-Object -First 20; $running | Stop-Process -Force; Remove-Job $job -Force)

PowerShell(Remove-Item "d:\\ai-mom-system\\electron-app\\debug-test.js" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item "d:\\ai-mom-system\\electron-app\\test-minimal.js" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item "$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop\\electron-debug.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item "$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop\\electron-test.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "cleaned")
